label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Microsoft Privacy Statement current through early 2025. Notable: Microsoft collects extensive data across integrated services (Office, Windows, Bing, Edge). Copilot AI training practices are evolving. Cross-service profiling is significant. Many users may not realize extent of data collection across Microsoft ecosystem.
